title: phegopteris falciculata
intro: Phegopteris falciculata, also known as the autumn fern or Japanese chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phegopteris falciculata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris falciculata include tea infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
